hero.subheadline: Streamline your operations, delight your guests, and grow your revenue with Grafterr's all-in-one restaurant technology platform.

featuresSection.title: Everything you need to
featuresSection.subtitle: From the front of house to the kitchen, Grafterr powers every part of your restaurant with intelligent, connected technology.

products.name: Point of Sale
products.description: A lightning-fast POS system designed for the demands of busy restaurants. Handle high-volume service with ease, reduce errors, and keep your team moving.

products.name: Self-Service
products.description: Let customers order at their own pace with beautiful kiosk and QR ordering experiences that increase average order value and reduce wait times.

products.name: Kitchen Management
products.description: A powerful kitchen display system that keeps your kitchen in perfect sync with front-of-house, reducing errors and improving ticket times.
